english: bok choy / pak choi (a type of Chinese cabbage)
notes: Loanword from Cantonese. Also written 'Pak-Choi'. Used in German cooking, especially in Asian-inspired dishes. The article 'der' is most common, though 'das' is also occasionally used.

sentences.german: Ich kaufe frischen Pak Choi auf dem Wochenmarkt.
sentences.english: I buy fresh pak choi at the weekly market.

sentences.german: Der Pak Choi ist reich an Vitaminen und Mineralstoffen.
sentences.english: Pak choi is rich in vitamins and minerals.
